name: Swiss-Sauced Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the broccoli and remove any outer leaves and tough parts of the stalks.
2. Cut the broccoli stalks lengthwise into uniform spears, following the branching lines.
3. In a 1-quart casserole, combine the broccoli, water, and 1/8 tsp salt.
4. Cook on high power for 5 to 6 minutes or until tender. Let stand while preparing the sauce.
5. For the sauce, melt butter or margarine in a 1-cup measure on high power for 30 to 45 seconds.
6. Stir in flour, dash of salt, and pepper.
7. Add milk and cook uncovered on high power for 1 to 2 minutes until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
8. Stir in shredded Swiss cheese until melted.
9. Drain the broccoli.
10. Serve the sauce over the broccoli.
